decisions.decision: Use the current negative auth and rate-limit tests in `BayesMarketApiAuthRateLimitTests` as the authoritative preserved sentinel inventory for this step: the existing ProbabilityEdit missing/blank/malformed/disabled/429 cases, market-resolve missing/blank/malformed plus disabled-limiter coverage including the older missing-agent overlap, create-market missing-agent coverage, the unsupported POST router `404` control, and the direct duplicate-header `resolve_write_request_agent(...)` check.
alternatives_rejected: Trim the older market-resolve missing-agent test because the grouped valid-agent test already covers missing, blank, and malformed cases.
Expand the preserved sentinel inventory to new route-local comment-post or event-trade auth negatives during this step.

decisions.decision: Treat `test_comment_post_http_returns_accepted_comment_contract_with_rate_limit_headers` and `test_protected_post_routes_emit_rate_limit_headers_on_first_success` as settled step-3 breadth coverage that should remain untouched here. Leave the separate ProbabilityEdit anonymous no-header success and quota-accounting tests intact, but do not recast them as new step-4 absence-path sentinels.
alternatives_rejected: Reshape the step-3 breadth tests into the preserved negative-sentinel inventory.
Broaden this step into a new pass over all success-path or anonymous-success rate-limit assertions.

decisions.decision: If execution uncovers a regression, fix only the preserved tests or the shared protected-write seam in `backend/server.py` (`resolve_write_request_agent(...)`, `_enforce_write_controls()`, `rate_limit_headers(...)`, or `BayesHandler.handle_api()`) rather than adding new transport-specific duplicate-header cases or cloning route-local auth/rate-limit matrices.
alternatives_rejected: Add end-to-end duplicate-header transport tests or comma-separated single-header cases as part of this preservation step.
Duplicate the full auth and limiter matrix across every protected POST route instead of relying on the shared backend seam.

steps.task: Audit `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` against the researched inventory and confirm the preserved sentinel set still matches the current ProbabilityEdit missing/blank/malformed/disabled/429 coverage, market-resolve missing/blank/malformed plus disabled-limiter coverage, create-market missing-agent coverage, the unsupported POST router `404` control, and the direct duplicate-header check after the step-3 breadth additions.

If any preserved sentinel has drifted, update only the affected tests to restore the current absence-path contract while keeping the older market-resolve missing-agent overlap and the direct duplicate-header seam intact.

Only if the restored sentinel tests expose a real defect, patch the shared protected-write path in `backend/server.py` so the existing auth and rate-limit behavior holds without route-local special cases or new breadth obligations.

Run the focused Bayes market auth/rate-limit test slice covering the preserved sentinels, verify the diff stays limited to the intended preservation scope, then stage and commit the task artifact with the requested message.
